segments.integrated_caption: The video opens on a vibrant street scene, featuring various shops like a teapot shop and a fruit store, as cheerful, upbeat background music begins. A Panda Police Officer stands beside a black car, holding a yellow flower, while a Mail Carrier walks past. A male narrator announces, "Today, Peppa and her family are having a..." before Peppa Pig excitedly finishes, "...big party tonight!" The scene shifts to a close-up of a smartphone screen displaying a photo of Peppa Pig and her family with a pink, floral background. The camera pulls back to show the Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George—standing on the sidewalk. Daddy Pig, with his deep, booming voice, exclaims, "See you there!", followed by Mummy Pig's gentle voice, "It's gonna be fun!" They are greeted by Mr. Bull, a brown bull in an orange shirt, who holds up his phone showing the same family photo and gruffly asks, "A party? What's the occasion?" The text 'Really Big News' appears above them. Peppa, with her excited child's voice, reveals, "Oh, it's because we have to tell everyone the really big news!" Mummy Pig gasps, and Daddy Pig nervously tries to cover, "Just a party for... reasons." Mr. Bull laughs heartily, declaring, "Oh, lovely! I'll be there with bells on!" George Pig, with a curious child's voice, asks, "Why would he wear bells?" Mummy Pig then quietly reminds them, "Remember, we're not telling anyone the really big news until we've told Granny and Grandpa Pig at the party." As the group walks down the street, passing a bakery with cakes in the window, Peppa, concerned, asks, "But what if they ask us?" Daddy Pig calmly advises, "If someone asks, see if you can talk about something else." George makes a squealing sound and confidently states, "I can do that!" The narrator explains that Peppa and George are helping to prepare for the party and doing their best not to tell everyone the really big news. Peppa gasps again. They encounter Mr. Dog, a gray dog in a red cap, holding balloons shaped like a dinosaur and a bear, and showing a family photo on his phone, asking in a friendly, slightly confused voice, "Ooh, what are we celebrating?" The narrator notes that everyone is very interested. Finally, Madame Gazelle, a yellow gazelle in a chef’s hat, shows them a cake-themed family photo on her phone, starting to say in an elegant, slightly curious voice, "Ooh, big..." as the segment ends, maintaining a cheerful and celebratory atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with Peppa Pig, George Pig, Mummy Pig, and Daddy Pig walking cheerfully through a vibrant town street, passing a bakery displaying cakes and a market. An unidentified female voice asks, "News, is it?" as Mr. Dog joins them, holding dinosaur and bear balloons, followed by Mr. Bull, whose arrival is marked by a car horn sound, urging, "Come on, little piggies!" He shows a smartphone with a Pig family photo. Madame Gazelle, in her chef’s hat, also appears, holding a phone with a cake-themed photo. Peppa Pig, with her high-pitched voice, excitedly guesses the occasion, first as a "baking shop," then a "big hat party," and finally a "baby carrot," which George Pig, in his small voice, echoes as "lots of baby carrots." Daddy Pig, in his booming voice, exclaims "Oh! Wow!" in surprise. Mummy Pig, with a warm tone, playfully asks George, "Really, George? Wee!" The scene transitions to a festive indoor birthday celebration, adorned with colorful balloons and streamers. A large chocolate cake with a toy digger sits on a table. Mummy Pig, now in a pink dress and pearl necklace, beams, while Daddy Pig, in a teal suit, looks surprised then delighted. The narrator announces it's "time for the party and almost time for the really big news." Mummy Pig expresses satisfaction, "Well done, team. We managed to keep the secret for the whole day," to which Daddy Pig adds, "I wasn't sure we'd make it." Peppa Pig confirms, "Yep, we didn't tell anyone the real news, did we, George?" prompting Daddy Pig to question, "Wait, what do you mean, real news?" The celebration expands to include Mr. Bull, Mr. Dog, and Madame Gazelle, all wearing party hats and posing for a group photo. Madame Gazelle, with an enthusiastic voice, declares she's "Excited for the big hat party!" and Mr. Dog, in a gruff voice, congratulates them on a "new bakery!" The atmosphere remains joyful and vibrant, with everyone smiling.

The party reaches its peak as the room fills with balloons, and the characters dance and celebrate together, with Peppa Pig and George Pig jumping joyfully in the center amidst cheers and celebratory sounds like "Woohoo!" and "Bravo!", all wearing party hats and smiling under the colorful decorations.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Mummy Pig peacefully sleeping, her gentle snores and yawns filling the quiet room. Daddy Pig's calm, deep voice narrates, explaining that Mummy Pig is enjoying a relaxing lie-in. Suddenly, the tranquility is shattered by excited squeals and a party blower as the room bursts into a vibrant celebration, filled with colorful balloons and festive decorations. Daddy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig joyfully surprise Mummy Pig with a birthday cake, all shouting, "Happy Mummy's Day!" Mummy Pig wakes with delight, her voice surprised and happy as she thanks them and exclaims, "Oh, so many balloons!" Daddy Pig chuckles, playfully adding that the balloons are "eco-friendly" and "loud." Peppa, in her child-like, enthusiastic voice, explains the special occasion: "Now there's a baby in your tummy, we thought you're going to be even more of a mummy, so today is..." The family then choruses, "Even More Mummy's Day!" as the title text appears on screen. Peppa, holding the two-layered cake with a single candle, presents it to Mummy Pig, who, amused, asks, "Cake for breakfast?" before accepting and suggesting they go downstairs. Daddy Pig teasingly asks if she's truly awake, to which Mummy Pig playfully replies, "I am now!" As the family descends the staircase, still surrounded by balloons, Daddy Pig narrates that the hallway is also filled. Mummy Pig, delighted, exclaims, "Oh, even more balloons!" Peppa reiterates, "For Even More Mummy's Day!" Mummy Pig chuckles, making an ironic comment, "You know, sometimes, less is more!" amidst the continued excited squeals from Peppa and George, maintaining a cheerful and loving atmosphere throughout.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with the Pig family celebrating a joyful occasion in their home, decorated with colorful balloons and festive garlands. Peppa Pig, in her red dress, excitedly exclaims "Ah! Go!" as she jumps around with George, holding a two-layered birthday cake with pink frosting and a single candle. Daddy Pig, in his teal suit and glasses, asks "Ooh, what's this coming from the living room?" as he stands beside Mummy Pig, who is in her pink dress. Peppa excitedly reveals, "Oh, a daisy chain!" and instructs, "You have to follow it." Daddy Pig expresses "Oh, wow!" as the scene transitions to the living room, now adorned with daisy garlands, where the family gathers around a coffee table with the cake. Peppa proudly states, "It took us ages to make," to which Daddy Pig replies, "I can only imagine." Peppa then presents "Here's more cake!" and explains, "We all made the daisy chain together." Daddy Pig gently tells George, "That's enough daisies now, George. Sometimes, less is more," but Peppa playfully counters, "It's even more Mummy Pig's day, so we need even more daisies, George!" George makes grunting sounds in agreement with Peppa, prompting Daddy Pig to respond with a hesitant "Um..." The setting then shifts outdoors to a sunny meadow filled with daisies, where Daddy Pig and the children playfully interact with the flowers, before returning indoors to the living room, still celebrating with the cake. The final scenes show the family in the kitchen, where Mummy Pig is lying in a pink bed. Peppa triumphantly announces "Ta-da!" as she and George present the cake to her. Daddy Pig laughs, and Mummy Pig, waking up, delightedly exclaims, "Oh, cake! Thanks, George." She humorously adds, "I know I'm eating for two, but..." and playfully guesses, "Oh! Let me guess. Thought so." Daddy Pig begins to tell a "Funny story about this..." as Peppa, still excited, demands "More!" The video ends with Peppa and George smiling happily in front of a refrigerator displaying a family photo, encapsulating a warm, celebratory, and family-centered mood focused on love and togetherness.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with Daddy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig at a bakery shop, accompanied by car engine sounds and a 'ding' as Daddy Pig uses a pink smartphone to select a layered cake from a digital menu, tapping the screen and saying, "Oh, just a little bigger." His choice is confirmed with a green checkmark. Peppa Pig exclaims excitedly, "Woo! Yay! Whoa, that's enough!" with George Pig adding excited squeals, as the family drives home in their red car with the cake securely packed on the roof, Daddy Pig adding, "Whoa, that's enough, George." A whooshing sound and another 'ding' signal their arrival home, where they enter a brightly lit kitchen. Mummy Pig is already present, and the family gathers around a table with multiple cakes. Daddy Pig holds up his smartphone, showing a family photo, and is heard saying, "Oh, not that picture," while an automated voice confirms, "Order confirmed." Daddy Pig lets out a satisfied sigh. Peppa exclaims, "Yay! Hooray! Woohoo! Yay!" with George adding more excited squeals, then declaring, "Even more cake! Even more Mummy's Day!" Mummy Pig laughs softly, thanking them and saying, "Thank you! We can share it with everyone we know!" A 'ding' sound accompanies a transition to the family standing in front of a large, colorful family drawing, decorated with hearts and stripes, which Mummy Pig asks, "Is that what I think it is?" George excitedly shouts, "Happy even more Mummy's Day!" Daddy Pig chuckles, and Mummy Pig exclaims, "What a lovely, huge card!" Daddy Pig states, "Mummy Pig knows that less is more," but Mummy Pig adds, "One thing is still missing though." Daddy Pig replies, "But there is one more thing she'd like," and Peppa excitedly shouts, "A family squeeze!" The family shares a warm hug, with Daddy Pig and Mummy Pig embracing, while Peppa and George stand beside them, smiling, accompanied by excited squeals and laughter from the children and Daddy Pig's chuckles, creating a joyful and celebratory atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a whimsical, abstract sequence featuring Mummy Pig in an orange dress, floating amidst colorful, swirling backgrounds with floating food items like soup and cake, suggesting a dreamlike state of cravings, accompanied by light, dreamy music. A voiceover announces, "Mummy Pig is having cravings," as the word 'Cravings' appears in bold red text. The scene transitions to a lively indoor party setting where Mummy Pig, now smiling, stands beside Daddy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig. Daddy Pig, wearing glasses and a teal suit, greets Mummy Pig, who then explains, "I can't decide what to eat. My cravings keep changing." Peppa Pig, in a red dress, asks, "What's cravings?" Mummy Pig clarifies that having a baby means her food preferences are "always changing, and sometimes a bit strange." Daddy Pig recalls, "with George, you always ate ketchup and bananas," prompting a disgusted "Ew!" from George Pig. Mummy Pig retorts that when Peppa was in her tummy, she "craved strawberries and mayonnaise," eliciting a collective "Yuck!" from the children. Mummy Pig then confidently states, "It's all right. I'll figure it out." Peppa suggests, "We can use this map to help you choose, Mummy!" to which Mummy Pig responds, "Oh, good idea!" Peppa excitedly points out options like "pizza, or noodles, or whoa!" before the map dramatically breaks. Daddy Pig calmly remarks, "Oh dear, the map has broken," but quickly reassures, "No worries, I'll fix that in a jiff!" The scene concludes with a voiceover mentioning that this event has given Peppa an idea, as the family stands near food tables with other characters like a rabbit, a brown bear, and a gazelle, all in a bright, cheerful atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a brightly lit restaurant with checkered flooring, where Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig gather around a large, colorful Spinning Wheel. Daddy Pig, with his deep voice, initially suggests "A great idea," but Peppa Pig, in her high-pitched, enthusiastic voice, clarifies, "Wait, we can still use it to pick the food, like a spinny wheel!" As Daddy Pig spins the wheel, which features various food icons, Peppa exclaims "Whee!" Daddy Pig then says, "Oh, I see. Let's have a go. I'll have..." The wheel spins with a distinct whirring sound and stops on salad, prompting Peppa to shout "Tada!" Daddy Pig, however, expresses mild disappointment, noting, "Oh, salad. That's uh, just as good as a big bowl of pasta." Peppa then encourages, "Your turn, Mummy! Whee!" The wheel spins again, landing on noodles. Mummy Pig, with a warm voice, excitedly declares, "Noodles! I love noodles! Let's go!" The family moves to a table where Mr. Bull, holding a bowl of noodles, cheerfully exclaims, "Mmm, noodles for lunch!" as they all enjoy their meal. Peppa describes the noodles as "so wiggly," to which Mummy Pig agrees, "Yes, they are," but then changes her mind, "Maybe not noodles. Let's try again. Maybe something a bit less wiggly." The scene shifts back to the wheel, which Daddy Pig spins again. Peppa identifies "Fish!" when it lands there, but Mummy Pig quickly rejects it with "Ooh, no." Finally, the wheel lands on pizza, and Peppa reacts with joy, confidently stating, "Everybody loves pizza, Mummy!" Mummy Pig expresses doubt, "Maybe not everybody, Peppa," while Daddy Pig, with a hint of longing, admits, "Sorry, cravings." Mummy Pig playfully responds, "Oh, you!" The family then moves to a counter where Madame Gazelle serves them pizza, maintaining the cheerful and playful atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The Pig family visits a vibrant restaurant with checkered flooring and purple walls. Daddy Pig, a pink pig in glasses and a teal suit, spins a colorful food-themed wheel. Mummy Pig, in an orange dress, expresses her desire for pasta, stating, "I can always eat pasta. Let's do it." Peppa Pig, in a red dress, questions, "Are you sure?" but Mummy Pig enthusiastically confirms, "Oh yes. Broccoli pasta is delish." The wheel, however, lands on salad with a distinct stopping sound, prompting Peppa to exclaim, "Uh-oh." Mummy Pig, initially delighted, then has a minor mishap, apologizing, "Excuse me, sorry." Daddy Pig, moving through the lively restaurant, announces, "Coming through!" and then exclaims, "Oh!" Peppa, concerned, asks, "Are you okay, Mummy?" Mummy Pig reassures her, "Fine, darling, thank you," and suggests, "Why don't you all get your lunch and I'll try again in a little while." Daddy Pig encourages the children, "Come on, team. You heard Mummy." Peppa excitedly shouts, "Yay!" while George makes a sound of surprise. Daddy Pig narrates Mummy Pig's struggle, saying, "But Mummy's not sure she'll ever find something to eat." Mummy Pig then notices something, remarking, "Ooh, that pickle smells good, George," and asks Peppa, "And uh, could I borrow a bit of this, Peppa?" Peppa agrees with an "Okay!" Daddy Pig, observing, comments, "Don't need all this bread, do you?" and affectionately tells Mummy Pig, "Help yourself, pickle." Daddy Pig narrates Mummy Pig's success, "Mummy Pig has finally found something to eat," describing it as "A peanut butter and pickle sandwich." Mummy Pig triumphantly presents her creation with a "Tada!" and savors it, murmuring, "Mmm, perfect." Daddy Pig concludes, "It's your new..." as the segment ends, implying a new favorite. The family shares a joyful meal, laughing and enjoying their food amidst other patrons like Mr. Bull, Mr. Dog, Madame Gazelle, and a Rabbit, adding to the cheerful atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene unfolds in a brightly lit medical room with light green walls, a blue filing cabinet, a desk with a purple phone, and a framed certificate, all set to a gentle, cheerful background music. Peppa Pig, in her red dress, stands beside Mummy Pig, who wears a light blue hospital gown. A White Rabbit Doctor, in a green coat with a stethoscope and triangular pendant, holding a red medical box, greets them warmly in a calm, friendly female voice, saying, "come for your baby check too." Peppa excitedly exclaims, "Yes!" after a small "whoops" sound, and the doctor responds, "Lovely," before explaining she needs to do "some quick tests to make sure you and the baby are healthy." The doctor then states she'll "need to listen to your heartbeat, Mummy Pig." Peppa, with her childlike voice, eagerly offers, "You can listen to my heartbeat first, Doctor Polar Bear!" misidentifying the doctor, and adding, "That way Mummy will know it's A-OK." The doctor gently responds, "Oh, Peppa, that's very sweet," as Peppa laughs. A stethoscope sound of a heartbeat is heard, followed by the doctor declaring, "Perfect. You both have very healthy hearts." Peppa cheers, "Hooray!" The doctor then announces, "We'll use this tape to measure your bump and see how the baby is growing." Mummy Pig, in a slightly flustered adult female voice, interjects, "I think I need a toilet break! Honestly, it's like every five minutes." The doctor reassures her, "That's okay. You can fill this." Peppa, curious, asks, "Fill it with what?" Suddenly, George Pig, in his blue shirt, runs into the frame, holding a yellow horn and a blue string, excitedly shouting, "Hey!" He blows his horn, prompting Peppa's laughter. Peppa then playfully tells him, "George, stop it!" Mummy Pig returns, stating, "Much better," and the doctor continues, "Well, good Mummy Pig is back, it's time to listen to the..." The atmosphere remains lighthearted and cheerful, with all characters displaying positive emotions.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene unfolds in a brightly lit medical room with light green walls and a blue filing cabinet, where Mummy Pig lies in a hospital bed, wearing a light blue gown and smiling. The White Rabbit Doctor, dressed in a green coat with a stethoscope and a triangular pendant, holds a purple medical device with a heart icon, explaining in a calm, informative voice, "New baby. This machine is called a Doppler. It's a bit like a microphone, so we can hear the baby." Daddy Pig stands beside the bed, smiling warmly, while Peppa Pig, in her red dress, looks excited and curious, exclaiming in a high-pitched voice, "I can't wait! I have so many questions!" She then enthusiastically addresses the baby, "Hello little baby, I'm your big sister Peppa." George Pig, in his blue shirt, holds a yellow horn and blue string, making playful babbling sounds like "Baba!" and "Da-yee-shoo?" as Peppa continues to ask the unborn baby questions like, "What is your favorite color? Do you like muddy puddles, or...?" The White Rabbit Doctor laughs gently, reassuring them, "Great questions. But the baby can't talk quite yet." George makes a curious "Ooooh" sound. The doctor then builds anticipation, stating, "But if we listen closely, we'll be able to hear something very special." A clear, rhythmic baby's heartbeat is heard, prompting a delighted "Oh!" from Daddy Pig. Peppa, amazed, asks, "Is that the baby's heart?" The White Rabbit Doctor confirms, "Yes, and it all sounds perfect," as Mummy Pig laughs joyfully while her height is measured with a white tape. Peppa, filled with wonder, asks, "It's going to be a real baby, isn't it?" The doctor hums affirmatively. Peppa then expresses innocent worries, "Um, what if the baby doesn't like teddies, or spaghetti, or me?" to which the White Rabbit Doctor gently replies, "Don't worry. Everything..." The cheerful and affectionate atmosphere, underscored by gentle, whimsical background music, emphasizes a routine baby check-up focused on family bonding and the anticipation of the new arrival.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens in a medical room with light green walls, where Mummy Pig, in a pink bed, is measured for height by the White Rabbit Doctor, who holds a purple medical device. A calm, reassuring male narrator explains that "everything is going to be A-OK" and "Peppa's very excited to meet the new baby." Daddy Pig stands by, smiling warmly, while Peppa and George look on excitedly. George playfully blows a yellow horn, making a distinct honk, as the narrator adds that "the baby can't wait to meet her either." Peppa, with a child's voice, speculates, "I think it's a baby's brother," which George corrects to "No, or a sister," before Peppa playfully suggests "No, or a... dinosaur!" George excitedly agrees "Yes!" but Peppa quickly corrects him, "Wait, no, George!" The narrator then clarifies that "Peppa and George are going to find out if the baby in Mummy Pig's tummy is a little brother or sister." George makes a happy sound, and Daddy Pig, in a deep, calm voice, reassures them, "It doesn't matter what the baby is." Peppa exclaims, "You're back!" and Mummy Pig, with a gentle, warm voice, adds, "Just as long as it's happy and healthy." The scene transitions to a close-up of George’s drawing of a pink cat with a blue belly, which Peppa then shows to Daddy Pig, who smiles. The family moves outside to a sunny yard in front of a yellow house, joined by Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig, who react with delight as Peppa and George present their drawings. Peppa, curious, asks, "So the color in the baby balloon tells us what the baby is?" Daddy Pig confirms, "It does, but careful, we don't want it to pop or to..." Peppa finishes his thought, concerned, "Float away down the hill!" The family then gets into their red car, with Daddy Pig driving, Mummy Pig in the passenger seat, and Peppa and George in the back, as a large yellow balloon with pink hearts floats beside the car. As they drive along a road with green hills, the balloon floats away, and the family looks up in surprise. Daddy Pig urgently exclaims, "Ah, let's catch that balloon!" The car engine revs and tires squeal as they speed up, with Peppa excitedly urging, "Faster! Faster!" Daddy Pig then shouts, "Stop!" The car screeches to a halt at a construction site where Mr. Bull, wearing a yellow hard hat and safety vest, stands beside a traffic light and orange cone, looking concerned as the balloon drifts past. Peppa quickly calls out, "Quickly, everyone! Mr. Bull, the..." just before Mr. Bull makes a distinct 'moo' sound, as the atmosphere shifts from cheerful to slightly anxious.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a bright, sunny park with green grass, leafy trees, and a clear blue sky. Daddy Pig, wearing his teal suit and glasses, is holding a large yellow balloon with pink hearts, which floats upward, catching the excited attention of Peppa Pig in her red dress and George Pig in his blue shirt. The group, including Mummy Pig in an orange dress, Mr. Bull in a yellow hard hat, the Zebra Character pushing a stroller with two Baby Zebras, Grandpa Rabbit with a white beard and blue hat, and Mr. Dog in a red cap, gather around, watching the balloon with expressions of surprise and delight. A breathless female voice, identified as the Zebra Character, is heard saying "running by the pole, please!" amidst running sounds. A deep narrator's voice states, "Until finally..." followed by an excited child's voice, likely Peppa's, exclaiming, "We got it!" Pig snorts punctuate the scene as the balloon drifts. Mummy Pig's calm voice suggests, "Now, let's find out if it's a brother or sister, shall we?" Daddy Pig's deep voice adds, "Before anything else goes wrong," leading to the group chanting "Three, two, one!" The narrator then reveals, "The balloon is empty," and "Now, no one knows what the new baby will be." Peppa's voice reassures, "It's okay, as long as it's happy and nice, oh!" Mummy Pig agrees with "Exactly!" and then calls out "George!" as Peppa exclaims "Stop!" The breathless Zebra Character apologizes, "Excuse me, sorry, Dr. Easel. Oh, I love your shoes," before admitting, "I, uh, might have forgot to put the results in the balloon." She then triumphantly declares, "But, I've got them here!" and, catching her breath, humorously remarks, "Phew! That was a lot of running. Try doing it pregnant." Daddy Pig's voice then announces, "Well, little piggies, looks like you're getting..." which Mummy Pig excitedly finishes with, "A little sister!" as the camera zooms in on Peppa and George, who are smiling and waving. The Zebra Character approaches with a small envelope, which she hands to Daddy Pig, who then shares it with Mummy Pig, both smiling warmly. The group stands together, happy and united, as the balloon floats gently above them, symbolizing joy and togetherness in the playful outdoor setting, punctuated by a final pig snort.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a cheerful, upbeat tune as Peppa Pig and her friends and family gather in a sunny park for a baby shower, with the narrator explaining, "Everyone is very excited to meet the new baby. But no one's more excited than Peppa." Peppa, in her red dress, excitedly waves, exclaiming, "I can't wait to meet you!" Daddy Pig, in his teal suit, and Mummy Pig, in her orange dress, smile warmly, while George, in his blue shirt, stands nearby. Other characters like Mr. Bull, Mr. Dog, and Grandpa Rabbit are present as a female voice, likely Mummy Sheep, announces, "Okay, places everyone. She'll be here any minute!" The narrator reveals, "Today, Mummy Sheep is throwing Mummy Pig a surprise party to celebrate her new baby," leading to a group cheer and the announcement, "It's a special party called a baby shower!" Mummy Pig gratefully responds, "Thank you so much!" as a lavish spread of cakes and snacks is shown. Suddenly, dark clouds appear, and the sound of rain and thunder begins, causing dismay among the guests. Daddy Pig urgently calls, "Everyone indoors!" as they rush to a brightly lit kitchen. The narrator comments, "Big wave for the mummy-to-be!" and Mummy Pig, sounding resigned, says, "Well, it was wonderful." The narrator adds, "Unfortunately, Mummy Sheep didn't plan for the British weather," and Peppa sighs, "Oh." Mummy Sheep reassures, "It's okay. We can just do it another day," before quickly changing her mind with "I know! Let's do it!" and offering "Uh, scone, anyone?" then announcing, "It's ready!" The scene shifts to a festive party room decorated with balloons, streamers, and a large drawing of the Pig family. Daddy Pig calls out "Peppa!" as the group celebrates joyfully with cheerful music and party sounds, Peppa playing a drum and George a xylophone, ensuring the celebration continues indoors with a lively atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens in a brightly colored room with green walls and purple armchairs, adorned with children’s drawings of flowers, where Mummy Pig, in an orange dress, smiles warmly. A narrator's voice explains that Mummy Sheep has brought the baby shower indoors, away from the rain, and made some special baby-themed games. The camera then shifts to a blue table laden with playful baby animal toys—a purple cat, green frog, brown monkey, yellow tiger, and brown owl—all arranged in diapers, suggesting a baby-themed event. A close-up reveals a purple table with baby supplies, including jars of baby powder, bottles, and a bowl of red liquid, possibly baby food. Mummy Pig is then joined by Peppa Pig in a red dress and Madame Gazelle, a white rabbit in a pink dress, as they stand together with joyful expressions. A child's voice, distinctly Peppa's, exclaims "Wow!" and asks, "You did all this for me?", to which an adult female voice, likely Mummy Pig's, warmly replies, "Of course we did." The group expands to include a Zebra character in a red dress with glasses, two small Baby Zebras in purple dresses, and another White Rabbit character in a yellow dress, all gathered around the table of baby toys. Peppa Pig excitedly points at the toys, and her voice announces, "This is a nappy changing race. First to change three nappies wins!" She then enthusiastically shouts, "Ready, go!" as the group shares happy, animated reactions, indicating a celebratory baby shower atmosphere. The narrator adds that "Mummy Pig is very good at changing nappies." The room is filled with festive decorations, including balloons and colorful furniture, creating a cheerful and lively environment, all set to a backdrop of lighthearted, cheerful music and excited chatter.
